ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status , sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status, sc_lon_m_contract.vourcher_no , sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_id , sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_date ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ,
sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid , sc_com_m_branch WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and (sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status <> '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no = '4' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/03/2020' and '13/03/2020' order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
